title: zanderone1980/codebot-ai
summary: Zero-dependency autonomous AI coding agent. Works with any LLM — Ollama, Claude, GPT, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral, Grok. Policy engine, Docker sandbox, 1,168 tests.

title: Kakz/prometheus-llm
summary: PrometheusLLM is a unique transformer architecture inspired by dignity and recursion. This project aims to explore new frontiers in AI research and welcomes contributions from the community. 🐙🌟

title: SonPari1/Search-Engine-Ui

title: DavidPacasCDB/transcribe-meetings
summary: InsightLens transforms business meetings into actionable, searchable knowledge. It ingests meeting recordings, slides, and chat logs, then uses advanced AI to transcribe.

title: bielz09/Enhanced-HIBP-Checker
summary: Python application that uses local Ollama LLM models to give advice on results found from HIBP (Have I Been Pwned) API

title: Lakatos179/soenneker.semantickernel.pool.ollama
summary: Provides Ollama-specific registration extensions for KernelPoolManager, enabling integration with local LLMs via Semantic Kernel.

title: mezmo/aura
summary: A production-ready framework for composing AI agents from declarative TOML configuration, with MCP tool integration, RAG pipelines, and an OpenAI-compatible web API.

title: ot4ank/auto-openwebui
summary: A bash script to automate running Open WebUI on Linux systems with Ollama and Cloudflare via Docker

title: shashank2122/Local-Voice
summary: A real-time, offline voice assistant for Linux and Raspberry Pi. Uses local LLMs (via Ollama), speech-to-text (Vosk), and text-to-speech (Piper) for fast, wake-free voice interaction. No cloud. No APIs. Just Python, a mic, and your voice.

title: prism-php/prism
summary: A unified interface for working with LLMs in Laravel

title: arthurpanhku/DocSentinel
summary: MCP server for AI agent for cybersecurity: automate assessment of documents, questionnaires & reports. Multi-format parsing, RAG knowledge base,Risks, compliance gaps, remediations.

title: mansurjisan/coral
summary: A self-hosted multi-agent AI assistant for NOAA ocean data, model code, and HPC workflows — powered by Ollama and MCP

title: cryptokid980/homelab-2-prod-ai-golden-path
summary: This is a golden path (opinionated shortcut) to explore AI from local homelab to PROD using OSS for technological independence and local LLM for privacy. We explore concepts like AI agents, RAG and LLM using OSS technologies like Linux, Opentofu, microk8s, DAPR, Ollama, TimescaleDB & pgai Vectorizer, Flask and Python.

title: emmieG/NexaCore
summary: OpenClaw + Ollama + SearXNG running fully local on Linux. No API keys, no cloud, no tracking.

title: wesleyscholl/squish
summary: 🤖🗜️⚡️ Compress local LLMs once, run them forever at sub-second load times. OpenAI + Ollama drop-in for Apple Silicon — statistically identical accuracy, 54× faster cold starts.

title: Bazinga23451/semantic-qa-gen
summary: A Python library for generating high-quality question-answer pairs from PDF, DOCX, MD, and TXT files

title: miclaldogan/bantzv2
summary: Bantz won't be a helper; he will be your Host. Your computer will become his studio, and your tasks will give the "entertainment." He won't just execute code; he will "pull strings" behind the scenes with a smile that you can hear through the text.

title: langbot-app/LangBot
summary: Production-grade platform for building agentic IM bots - 生产级多平台智能机器人开发平台. 提供 Agent、知识库编排、插件系统 / Bots for Discord / Slack / LINE / Telegram / WeChat(企业微信, 企微智能机器人, 公众号) / 飞书 / 钉钉 / QQ / Satori e.g. Integrated with ChatGPT(GPT), DeepSeek, Dify, n8n, Langflow, Coze, Claude, Gemini, MiniMax, Ollama, SiliconFlow, Moonshot, GLM, clawdbot / openclaw
